flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Texas Southern University are 30% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($38.9k vs $55.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Texas Southern University rose 43% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.6k → $9.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Texas Southern University fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (8.2% → 6.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Texas Southern University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (5.7k → 6.8k).
